title: Acquisition of a 75% shareholding in Fireblitz Extinguisher Limited and Fireblitz Europe Limited by Maple Armor Group Corporation: notice of final order
body: "The Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster has made a Final Order under the National Security and Investment Act 2021 in respect of the acquisition of a 75% shareholding in Fireblitz Extinguisher Limited and Fireblitz Europe Limited by Maple Armor Group Corporation. "
